title: The While Loop ⏳
description: Keep code running until a condition changes.

slides.title: Waiting for a Change ⏳
slides.content:
# The `while` Loop

A `for-in` loop is great when you know *exactly* how many times to loop (like 1 to 5).

But what if you don't know? Like "Keep asking the user until they guess the correct password"? We use a `while` loop!

A while loop acts exactly like an `if` statement, except when it finishes, it goes back and checks the condition again. It keeps looping **while** the condition is true.

slides.title: While Loop Syntax
slides.content: We need to make sure we change the condition *inside* the loop, otherwise it will run forever!

quizData.question: What happens if you FORGET to change the condition inside a while loop? (e.g. you never decrease the countdown)

options.text: You create an infinite loop and your app crashes/freezes.

quizData.explanation: If the condition never becomes false, the while loop will repeat forever. This is called an Infinite Loop, and it will crash your app!
